quotes.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
quotes.summary: Harry Potter, an eleven-year-old orphan, discovers that he is a wizard and is invited to study at Hogwarts. Even as he escapes a dreary life and enters a world of magic, he finds trouble awaiting him.

quotes.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
quotes.summary: A house-elf warns Harry against returning to Hogwarts, but he decides to ignore it. When students and creatures at the school begin to get petrified, Harry finds himself surrounded in mystery.

quotes.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
quotes.summary: Harry Potter's third year at Hogwarts turns out to be eventful as he gets tutored by Professor Lupin, a Defence Against the Dark Arts teacher, and tackles Sirius Black, a vengeful fugitive prisoner.

quotes.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
quotes.summary: In his fourth year at Hogwarts, Harry must reluctantly compete in an ancient wizard tournament after someone mysteriously selects his name, while the Dark Lord secretly conspires something sinister.

quotes.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
quotes.summary: Harry Potter and Dumbledore's warning about the return of Lord Voldemort is not heeded by the wizard authorities who, in turn, look to undermine Dumbledore's authority at Hogwarts and discredit Harry.

quotes.title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
quotes.summary: Dumbledore and Harry Potter learn more about Voldemort's past and his rise to power. Meanwhile, Harry stumbles upon an old potions textbook belonging to a person calling himself the Half-Blood Prince.

quotes.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows
quotes.summary: Harry Potter is tasked with the dangerous and seemingly impossible task of locating and destroying Voldemort's remaining Horcruxes.
